mano_cua.result_summary: TextColumn韩文输入功能正常。输入'한글'和'테스트'均无字符重复或丢失，Tab键切换后韩文保持完整，IME组合状态下Tab操作无异常。英文输入同样正常。最终表格状态：Row1(한글/hello)，Row2(테스트/Bezos)。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Korean characters entered correctly without duplication, Tab key behavior normal during IME composition.

deploy_notes.workaround: Library built with tsc watch, example app served with Vite on port 5173.
